---
title: "City of Gresham, Oregon"
number: 32
image: /images/gresham_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Gresham, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---

::: {.article}

# Solid Waste Collection and Program Analysis / Rate Setting

TODO: Contents

[By SkatePark in Main City Park, Gresham, Oregon.jpg - Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=70225826)
:::
